scenarios.name: macOS Gatekeeper block on first launch
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the exact xattr quarantine-removal command and points to System Settings Privacy & Security for Screen Recording and Accessibility permissions as described in the skill; baseline gives generic 'right-click open' advice and misses the specific permission grants.

scenarios.name: Polished landing-page product demo recording
scenarios.rationale: Treatment recommends OpenScreen's documented automatic cursor-following zooms, motion blur, gradient backgrounds, and 16:9 1080p web export; baseline suggests external tools like OBS or ffmpeg edits and misses the post-processing zoom workflow.
